theme_notes: Today's touchstones: the 2026 World Cup knockout rounds (England's dramatic win over Mexico, Belgium eliminating the USMNT, Trump calling FIFA's Infantino personally to reverse a red card), the NATO summit in Ankara (Trump reversing his own ban to sell F-35s to Turkey), Iran firing on ships in the Strait of Hormuz, Microsoft/Xbox axing 3,200 jobs (~20% of its gaming division), and Hamas ceding Gaza to a technocratic governing body.
settled: All square. England and Mexico had more drama getting here. Barely.
Dead even. Hamas ceded an entire government faster than you two usually settle.
Balanced. Unlike the Strait of Hormuz, which currently has ships on fire.
youOwe: Cheaper than a World Cup souvenir. Just as embarrassing to own.
Xbox cut 3,200 jobs with more follow-through than this.
Iran fired on two ships for less. You should feel something.
Belgium knocked out the USMNT. You haven't knocked out this tab yet.
That's a NATO parking pass in Ankara. Mid-tier debt. Very on-brand.
Enough to hire one technocratic governing official for your finances.
That's an Xbox engineer's last paycheck. Microsoft restructured. You haven't.
England beat Mexico with less drama than your debt management.
Almost enough for a Strait of Hormuz transit fee. Trump's not happy either.
Trump called Infantino personally about a red card. No one's calling about your tab.
Hamas handed over an entire government for this price. You can't hand over a Venmo.
Microsoft laid off 3,200 people this week. They moved decisively. Take notes.
NATO's billing this per delegate per day in Ankara. You've been in arrears longer.
At this level, Iran would've fired on something. You're still composing the text.
Turkey's getting F-35s in exchange for diplomacy. What are you exchanging? Nothing.
That's a real NATO contribution. You're contributing nothing. Not even to the group chat.
Russia launched a full missile barrage for less. Your partner's patience has outlasted it.
You owe enough to fund a Gaza technocratic government. For a month. With benefits.
theyOwe: Less than a Wimbledon strawberries order. Still owed. Do not let this go.
Barely enough for a World Cup group stage bet. Absolutely worth the grudge.
Iran fired on ships with more decisiveness than your partner paying you back.
England beat Mexico and showed up for it. Your partner owes you that energy.
One NATO summit minibar tab. Delegates expensed worse. Chase yours.
Enough to irritate Iran. Your partner has done more damage.
Belgium eliminated the USMNT cleaner than your partner's handling this debt.
Hamas ceded an entire territory faster. Your partner can't cede some cash.
The Strait of Hormuz is more navigable than your partner's excuses right now.
Trump called FIFA personally to un-ban a player. Call in a favor. You've earned it.
That's a World Cup quarterfinal ticket. Your partner is the own goal.
Microsoft axed 3,200 people this week. Your partner hasn't axed a single excuse.
Russia launched missiles for less. Your restraint is genuinely impressive.
NATO-level money. Invoke Article 5. This constitutes an attack on your sovereignty.
Trump threatened to 'finish the job' over Strait shipping. Consider your options.
Iran closed an international waterway over less. You're being remarkably civilized.
Turkey's getting F-35s. You're getting IOUs. Identical geopolitical energy.
Enough to run the Gaza technocratic government for a month. With competitive salaries.
